inputs.label: Measurement Value
inputs.businessContext: The child's measurement (e.g., weight, length, or head circumference).

businessContext_i18n.en: The child's measurement (e.g., weight, length, or head circumference).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çocuğun ölçümü (örn. ağırlık, boy veya baş çevresi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Messung des Kindes (z. B. Gewicht, Länge oder Kopfumfang).

inputs.label: L (Lambda)
inputs.businessContext: L parameter from the LMS growth reference (e.g., WHO/CDC) for the specific age, gender, and measurement type.

businessContext_i18n.en: L parameter from the LMS growth reference (e.g., WHO/CDC) for the specific age, gender, and measurement type.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirli yaş, cinsiyet ve ölçüm türü için LMS büyüme referansından (örn. WHO/CDC) L parametresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: L-Parameter aus dem LMS-Wachstumsreferenz (z. B. WHO/CDC) für das spezifische Alter, Geschlecht und die Messart.

inputs.label: M (Median)
inputs.businessContext: M parameter (median) from the LMS growth reference, in the same unit as the measurement.

businessContext_i18n.en: M parameter (median) from the LMS growth reference, in the same unit as the measurement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: LMS büyüme referansından M parametresi (medyan), ölçümle aynı birimde.
businessContext_i18n.de: M-Parameter (Median) aus dem LMS-Wachstumsreferenz, in derselben Einheit wie die Messung.

inputs.label: S (Coefficient of Variation)
inputs.businessContext: S parameter (generalized coefficient of variation) from the LMS growth reference.

businessContext_i18n.en: S parameter (generalized coefficient of variation) from the LMS growth reference.
businessContext_i18n.tr: LMS büyüme referansından S parametresi (genelleştirilmiş değişim katsayısı).

inputs.label: Measurement Type
inputs.businessContext: Indicator: 1 = Weight, 2 = Length, 3 = Head circumference. Used only for contextual clarity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicator: 1 = Weight, 2 = Length, 3 = Head circumference. Used only for contextual clarity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gösterge: 1 = Ağırlık, 2 = Boy, 3 = Baş çevresi. Yalnızca bağlamsal netlik için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Indikator: 1 = Gewicht, 2 = Länge, 3 = Kopfumfang. Nur für kontextuelle Klarheit.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
